info.name: Mind Gym Book API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Mind Gym Book Backend

Base URL: {{base_url}}

Platforms:
- WEBSITE: Physical book cart + orders + payment
- APP: Subscription + digital PDF reading

request.description: Step 1: Sends a 6-digit OTP to the user's email (valid 2 minutes).
Step 2: Verify OTP. Returns resetToken (valid 15 min). Auto-saves to {{reset_token}}.
Step 3: Reset password using the token from Step 2.

Returns signed Cloudinary PDF URL.
- Subscriber/Admin → Full PDF
- Others → Pages 1-5 preview
Extracts full text content from PDF for TTS.
Extracts text from a specific page for TTS. Change /page/1 to any page number.
Creates DB order from cart. Saves order_id to variable automatically.
Creates Razorpay order for the physical book order. Open Razorpay checkout with this.
Verifies Razorpay payment & marks order as PAID. Use 'test_signature' for dev bypass.
Downloads professional PDF invoice for the given order.
User can cancel order only if it's in 'processing' state. Restocks items automatically.
Returns tab counts: { all, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, returned }

query.description: Search by user name / email / phone / order ID

request.description: Search orders by customer name, email, phone, or order ID.

query.description: Search by name / email / phone / order ID

request.description: Sets delivery_status = 'shipped'. Allowed for PAID online orders or any COD orders.
Allowed: delivery_status (processing|shipped|delivered|cancelled|returned), payment_status, tracking_id, courier_name, tracking_url. Note: Marking as 'returned' automatically restocks books.
Permanently deletes an order.
APP use: Creates Razorpay order for subscription purchase.
Activates subscription after payment.
Targets: ALL, CATEGORY, USER. Placeholder {user_name} is supported.
Used by users during checkout to check if a coupon is valid and how much discount they get.
Public route to fetch static page content.
